probes.name: facility-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: facilities, resource_bookings, day_passes, passes, plus their indexes (facility_id + starts_at composite index for overlap check).

probes.name: facility-overlap-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite index (facility_id, starts_at, ends_at) WHERE status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND deleted_at IS NULL exists on resource_bookings. Missing this index makes overlap detection O(N) per facility — a p99 blowup waiting to happen.

probes.name: facility-serializable-supported
probes.description: Confirms the DB engine (PostgreSQL) accepts SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE. Fails hard on MySQL / SQLite where the guarantee differs.

probes.name: facility-pending-booking-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 100 rows in resource_bookings are stuck in status='pending' for > 60 min. Indicates ExpireLapsedBookingsJob has stalled.

probes.name: facility-overlap-counter-clean
probes.description: Reads academorix.facility.overlaps.detected counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal.

probes.name: facility-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileBookingOverlapsJob + ReconcileBookingsAgainstRetiredFacilitiesJob completed within the last 8 days (weekly cadence + 24h slop). Stale reconcilers indicate scheduler drift.

probes.name: facility-day-pass-sequence-gaps
probes.description: Scans the year's receipt_number sequence per tenant for gaps. A gap indicates a receipt generation race that dropped a number — accounting anomaly.

probes.name: facility-pass-double-spend-attempts
probes.description: Counts PASS_DOUBLE_SPEND error occurrences in the last 24h. Should be 0 — every fire indicates a race the observer's SELECT ... FOR UPDATE should have prevented.
